--- Menu Page: https://edessarestauranttn.net/nashville-edessa-restaurant-food-menu/ ---
Menu - Edessa Restaurant
Skip to content
Edessa restaurant
OUR MENU
COLD APPETIZERS
1. HUMUS
$8.95
Chickpea puree mixed with
fresh garlic, olive oil,fresh
lemon juice,salt,and white
pepper.
2. PATLICAN EZMESI
(BABA GHANOUSH)
$8.95
Roasted fresh eggplants,
tahini,garlic,lemon juice,
white paper,olive oil,and
salt.
3. MUHAMMARA
$7.95
Roasted red peppers mixed with walnut,
bread crumbs and extra virgin olive oil.
4. SHAKSHUKA
$8.95
Vegetarian medley of eggplant and zucchini
squash,fried in olive oil and mixed with a tomato
sauce made from green and red peppers,onions,
and garlic.
5. EZME (TURKISH SALSA) $
$8.95
Delicious mixture of fresh
tomatoes,bell peppers green
peppers,red onions,parsley,
garlic,olive oil,walnuts,fresh
lemon juice,pomegranate
molasses,and special
Anatolian spices.
6. HAYDARI
$8.95
Labneh with walnuts,
garlic,dill,and salt.
7. YAPRAK SARMA (STUFFED
GRAPE LEAVES)
$9.95
Grape leaves stuffed with rice,
onions,and tomatoes
seasoned with lemon juice,
olive oil and special
Anatolian spices.
8.EDESSA APPETIZER
PLATTER
$16.95
lumus, Ezme, Baba
hanoush,Stuffed
rape leaves,
abbouleh,
laydari and
hakshuka
9. CIG KOFTE (MILD SPICY /
VEGAN MEATBALLS) $
$12.95
Our homemade specialty.Kneaded bulgur wheat
with onions,garlic,local Anatolian spices,extra
virgin olive oil,tomato paste,red pepper paste,
pomegranate molasses,and fresh lemon juice.
Served with iceberg lettuce,lemon wedges,and
pomegranate sauce.
ENTREES
Unless otherwise stated, all main dishes are served with rice or bulgur, seasoned onion, grilled veggies, pickled red cabbage and bread. Allergies? Please let us know.
*Consuming raw or undercooked meats poultry, or seafood may increase your risk of foodborne illness.
BEEF AND LAMB
22. ADANA KABOB
$18.95
Two skewers of chargrilled ground lamb mixed
with herbs and Anatolian spices.
23. DONER (SHAWARMA/GYRO)
PLATE
$17.95
Marinated lamb grilled on a vertical rotisserie
and sliced very thin.
24. BOTAN KABOB
$18.95
Marinated and chargrilled cubes of lamb,
sliced very thin eggplants, onion, mushrooms,
green pepper, garlic, tomato, tomato sauce and
mixed with special Kurdish spices..
25. EDESSA STEAK
$27.95
Our Strip Steak is marinated with Kurdish-
Mediterranean herbs and seasonings
chargrilled,to caramelize the outside,
and remains juicy on the inside.
we cook our steak at the normal temperature (medium rare)
26 .* KUZU SIS (LAMB SHISH KABOB)
$22.95
Two skewers of chargrilled cubes of marinated lamb.
27 .* KUZU PIRZOLA (LAMB CHOPS)
$24.95
Marinated and chargrilled four lamb chops.
Family size!
39. KABOB FESTIVAL
FOR 2 $74.95 – FOR 3 $ 99.95 – FOR 4$ 119.95- FOR 6 $165.95
If you cannot make your mind up or you would like to have
a full course meal from delicious Turkish-Kurdish cuisine,
you should try Kabob Festival, which includes:
APPETIZES PLATER:
Haydari, humus, ezme, baba ghanous, shakshuka,muhammara
SALAD: Edessa salad
SOUP (CHOOSE ONE): Lentil or bean or chicken soup
ENTREE: Adana, chicken, Kofta kabob,and lamb chop.
RICE: Bulgur or yellow rice
DESSERT: Baklava
40. CORNISH CHICKEN
$19.95
Chargrilled skewer of whole Cornish
chicken marinated in special sauce.
41. TAVUK SIS $18.95
(CHICKEN SHISH
KABOB)
Two skewers of
chargrilled cubes of
tender, marinated chicken
42.TAVUK PIRZOLA
(CHICKEN CHOPS)
$18.95
Chicken chops marinated and grilled to perfection.
43. GRILLED CHICKEN WINGS
$18.95
Grilled chicken wings marinated with special Kurdish
spices served with rice grilled tomata,hot pepper,
red cabbage garnish,and onions
50. MERCIMEK (LENTIL) $6.95
Red lentil,onion,potato,carrot,
garlic,butter,black pepper,red pepper
and dry mint.
51. FASULYE (BEAN)
$6.95
White beans mixed with
tomatoes, onions, tomato sauce,
and spices.
52. CHICKEN SOUP
$7.95
A warm and hearty soup made with
chicken thighs, creamy broth, grated
carrots and potatoes, and
thin noodles. Lightly seasoned
with dill for a fresh touch.
Perfect for a cozy meal.
VEGETARIAN & PASTA
62. FALAFEL PLATE
$13.95
Fried patties made of chickpeas, parsley, cilantro,
onions and Anatolian spices, served with rice,
salad and tahini sauce.
63. KURDISH DELIGHT
$14.95
A delightful blend of pureed chickpeas combined
with fresh garlic, olive oil, fresh lemon juice, beets,
and white pepper, topped with
an oven-roasted veggie sauté.
64. CREAMY BASIL RIGATONI
$14.95
Creamy rigatoni pasta with a touch of heat from red
pepper flakes, enriched with the rich flavor of tomato paste,
blended with fresh basil and garlic,
and topped with Parmesan cheese.
65. FETTUCINE PASTA
$12.95
Parmesan cheese and Alfredo or Cajun cream
sauce over fettucine pasta.
+ Add chicken $5
+ Add shrimp $7
66. GRILLED VEGGIES PLATE
$14.95
Including mushrooms, onion, Brussels sprouts,
zucchini, carrot tomato and pepper served with
rice and salad.
KID'S MENU
69. CHICKEN TENDERS
$9.95
Three chicken tender strips deep
fried to golden brown served with
French fries.
70. CHICKEN NUGGETS
$8.95
Served with French fries.
SIDES & EXTRAS
GRILLED VEGGIE SKEWERS $6.95
FRENCH FRIES $6.45
RICE $4.95
ONE PITA BREAD $1.25
CHICKEN SKEWER $7.95
ADANA SKEWER $8.95
LAMB CHOPS $5.95
LAMB SHISH $9.95
DONER (SHAWARMA) $7.95
Pasta
$11.95
Parmesan cheese and alfredo or cajuns cream sauce over fettucine pasta.
DESSERTS
71. KUNAFE
$9.95
Shredded wheat with a layer of melted cheese,
topped with chopped pistachios and
syrup. Served with ice cream.
72. BAKLAVA
$6.45
Layers of phyllo dough covered with ground
pistachios or walnut and sweet syrup. Topped with
pistachios and served with ice cream.
73. EDESSA BAKLAVA
$9.95
Mix of dry apricot, raisin, walnut, figs, and fresh
apple wrapped with phyllo dough and topped with
ice cream and chopped pistachios. Served with
thick orange sauce.
74. MINI BIRTHDAY CAKE $12.95
75.BIRTHDAY CAKE $24.95
76. TIRAMISU $ 8.95
Chicken Skewer
$7.95
77. DUBAI CHOCOLATE
$13.95
This milk chocolate marvel is packed with
crunchy pistachios and kunafa, a crispy shredded
phyllo pastry, offering a delightful blend
of textures and flavors.
8. KATMER
$8.95
It is a crisp phyllo dough dessert that contains
istachios and clotted cream in it. Served with
aymak.
Adana Skewer
$7.95
79. LAVA CAKE
$10.95
A warm chocolate cake with a gooey,
melted center. Perfect for chocolate lovers.
HOT BEVERAGES
*Free refill on all drinks except Turkish coffee and hot tea.
KURDISH COFFEE
(KAHWA KIZWANA)/
DECAFFEINATED $5.95
COFFEE (2oz.) $4.95
It is prepared using very finely ground
coffee beans (unfiltered). Served in a
traditional cup on a copper coffee tray.
HOT TEA POT
. For 4 serving $8.95
. For 6 servings $10.95
TRADITIONAL TURKISH
HOT TEA $2.45
Choice of green or black tea.
COLD BEVERAGES
*Free refill on all drinks except yogurt drink and bottle drinks.
AYRAN (YOGURT DRINK)
BOTTLE $3.95
AYRAN (YOGURT DRINK)
HOMEMADE $3.95
SWEET OR UNSWEET
ICE TEA $2.95
OTHER SODAS $2.95
Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, Fanta,
Lemonade, Dr. Pepper
BOTTLE WATER $2.95
SPARKLING WATER $2.95
HOT APPETIZERS
10. SIGARA BOREGI
(CHEESE ROLL)
$9.95
Rolled and fried phyllo
stuffed with feta cheese and parsley.
Served with cucumber dip sauce.
11.GOZLEME
(ANATOLIAN
FLATBREAD)/h4>
$12.95
Homemade savory flatbread
stuffed with spinach and cheese.
12. SU BOREGI
$8.95
Thin sheets of hand-rolled
dough are boiled before being
baked, Traditionally layered
with a mixture of feta cheese,
parsley and ample butter. Served
with sliced tomatoes and cucumber.
13. BOREK
$9.95
Borek is a filled
pastry made with
flaky phyllo dough and
14. CABBAGE ROLLS
$10.95
Cabbage rolls stuffed with
ground beef and rice and
baked to perfection with
a tangy tomato
sauce.
15. FALAFEL
$7.95
Fried vegetable patties made of
chickpeas, parsley, cilantro, onions, and spices.
SPANAKOPITA
$9.95
A classic pastry filled with fresh spinach and
creamy cheese, baked to a golden perfection..
SALADS
15. COBAN SALATASI
(SHEPHERD’S SALAD)
$12.95
Traditional Turkish salad, prepared
with diced tomatoes, cucumbers,
red onions, and parsley seasoned with olive oil.
17. EDESSA SALAD
$12.95
Baby Arugula, lettuce, cucumber, tomato, tossed with
lemon, kurdish herbs and olive oil. Please inform your
server for the dressing.
18. TABBOULEH
$9.95
Salad made from cracked wheat, finely chopped
parsley and tomatoes, and seasoned with olive oil
and lemon juice.
19. GREEK SALAD
$9.95
Traditional Greek salad prepared with diced
tomatoes, cucumbers,red onions,olives,feta cheese
and seasonal fresh vegetables.
20. BURRATA SALAD
$15
Burrata cheese with baby arugula, oven-fried tomatoes,
cranberries, figs, pomegranate seeds,
basil, pesto, and sunflower seeds.
21. BEETS OR AVOCADO
SALAD
$11.95
Choice of avocado or
beets mixed with
augula, tomato,
feta cheese and your
choice of dressing.
Choose your protein
+ Add chicken $5.95
+ Add falafel $5.95
+ Add shawarma$5.95
+Add shrimp$6.95
+ Add grilled salmon$8.95
Choice of your dressing
· Italian dressing · Ranch · Tatziki
. Edessa homemade dressing
. Thousand island dressing
. Greek dressing
ENTREES
Unless otherwise stated, all main dishes are served with rice, seasoned onion, grilled veggies, pickled red cabbage and bread. Allergies? Please let us know.
*Consuming raw or undercooked meats poultry, or seafood may increase your risk of foodborne illness.
28. ISKENDER KABOB
$23.95
Doner kabob served over pan sautéed pita bread
topped with fresh tomato sauce & served with yogurt.
29. LAMB SHANK
$19.95
Braised lamb shank served with homemade
special lamb sauce.
30. TESTI KEBABI
(CLAY POT KABOB)
$19.95
Finely chopped marinated pieces of lamb cooked
with special Anatolian spices and vegetables in
delicious sauce for hours to maximize the taste.
Choice of cooking in the oven and served with
bread topped Clay Pot. + $4.95
31. BEYTI
$19.95
Grilled quality ground lamb with herbs and
vegetables and wrapped in lawash.Served
with yogurt and tomato sauce.
32. KOFTA KABOB
$17.95
Chargrilled ground lamb chopped onions, fresh
garlic,red and green bell pepper,white pepper,
cumin and flour.
33.MIXED GRILL KABOBS
$24.95
A combination of chargrilled lamb shish,chicken,
Adana kabob,and lamb chop.
34. SAÇ TAVA
$18.95
Diced cubes of beef,onion,garlic,peppers,thyme
sauéed on a thin cast-iron pan.
Choice of cooking in the oven and served with
bread topped Clay Pot. + $5.95
35. HOMEMADE MANTI
(TRADITIONAL TURKISH
DUMPLINGS)
$18.95
Tiny dumplings filled with spicy ground lamb,are
boiled like pasta and then served with garlicky
yogurt spicy butter and tomato sauce.
36. SHASHLIK KABOB
$28.95
Delicious beef tenderloin slices and purple onion rings,
marinated with special Mediterranean
grilled on skewers.
37. ALINAZIK
$19.95
Eggplant puree with yogurt,served with a choice of
seasoned af grilled lamb shish cubes,chicken or
Adana kabob
38. PICK TWO
$19.95
Two different choices of chicken shish,
Adana, lamb shish, kofta or doner shawarma.
44. SAUSAGE
PIDE(SUCUKLU PIDE) $18.95
A thick dough crust stuffed with Turkish sausage
and mozzarella cheese. Served with greens.
45. MOZZARELLA CHEESE PIDE
(KAŞARLI PIDE) $15.95
A thick dough crust stuffed with cheese. Served
with greens.
46. SPINACH AND FETA CHEESE
PIDE (ISPANAKLI PIDE) $16.95
A thick dough crust topped with spinach and
feta cheese. served with greens.
47. KUŞBAŞI PIDE
(MINCED MEAT PIDE) $19.95
Traditional flat bread topped with seasoned
diced beef filet mignon, tomato and green peppers.
48. LAHMACUN (Two Pieces)
$18.95
Ground meat blended with peppers, tomatoes,
parsley, and herbs on thinly crusted dough.
Served with seasoned red onions with parsley.
+ Each Additional lahmacun $10.95
49. FRESH LAVASH
(BALLOON BREAD)
$7.95
SEAFOOD
53.GRILLED SALMON  $22.95
Salmon seasoned with
our special Anatolian
spices and sautéed
vegetables.
Served with
rice..
54. KARIDES KEBABI
(SHRIMP KABOB)
$17.95
One skewer of shrimp
kabob served with
rice and grilled
vegetables.
55. GRILLED BRANZINI
$24.95
Grilled branzini served with rice or salad.
.
SANDWICHES & WRAPS
56. DONER (SHAWARMA) WRAP
$12.95
Thin sliced marinated lamb grilled on a vertical
rotisserie. Served with lawash, lettuce, tomatoes
and onions.
57. ADANA WRAP
$13.95
Our delicious Adana wrap are stuffed with an
incredibly delicious and perfectly seasoned
chargrilled ground lamb filling, tomatoes, onion,
lettuce, some French fries and tomato sauce.
58. FALAFEL VEGGIE WRAP
$13.95
Crispy falafel, fresh baby spinach, cherry tomatoes,
grilled peppers and hummus, all wrapped in a soft tortilla.
Comes with lemon tahini and tzatziki.
59. CHICKEN GYRO SANDWICH
$11.95
Chicken gyro meat served with pita, lettuce,
tomatoes, onions and tzatziki sauce.
+ Add fries $4.95
BURGERS
60. CHEESEBURGER
$15.95
8 oz. of angus beef with fresh
lettuce, tomatoes, onions,
mayonnaise, served
with French fries.
(Cheese upon
request)
61. CRISPY CHICKEN
(Original, Buffalo or BBQ)
$14.95
Lettuce, tomatoes, onions, mayonnaise served
with French fries. (Cheese upon request)
